Hero.description: Describe your business in any language and watch our AI create a premium, multi-page website with copy, images, and high-converting layouts in seconds.

multiPage.title: Multi-page Layouts
multiPage.desc: Generate complete sites with Home, About, Services, Contact, and more.

instantPreview.title: Instant Preview
instantPreview.desc: See your changes in real-time as the AI crafts your digital presence.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language
multiLanguage.desc: Full support for English, Russian, and Uzbek out of the box.

aiCore.title: AI Core Engine
aiCore.desc: Advanced AI with deep understanding of marketing intent and business needs.

bankSecurity.title: Bank-level Security
bankSecurity.desc: Your data is encrypted and protected with state-of-the-art security protocols.

optimizedSpeed.title: Optimized Speed
optimizedSpeed.desc: Lightweight code delivery ensures 100/100 Lighthouse performance scores.
